_comment: Sprint 22.5+ P0 hooks + Sprint 67 UserPromptSubmit hook (留尾 SSOT 治理) + Sprint 177 PostToolUse Bash hook (branch cleanup 自动化). 5 hooks. 详细: docs/AUTOMATION.md

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys, json, re; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read() or '{}'); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); bad = re.match(r'(^|/)(\.env|\.env\.local|\.env\..*\.local|data/processed/.*\.duckdb)$', p); sys.exit(2 if bad else 0)"

UserPromptSubmit.matcher: 剩余任务|留尾|backlog|todo|剩余待办
